title: Mandala's Dragon Mount Refreshed
body:
![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/n4X3EsE.png)


# ABOUT:

Improved textures for "[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-mounts-legacy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-mounts-legacy)".
Inspired by Jappa and Boss Refreshed, but with my personal style, and FPS friendly.


# FEATURES:

* Dragon texture inspired by "[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/boss-refreshed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/boss-refreshed)" [Optional Texturepack].
* Improved Dragon Egg Model and Texture.
* Medieval, and Vanilla Style!!

I hope you like it. ❤
